revision.text: --converts text with wikilinks, e.g "[[foo|gah]] is [[bar]]" to "gah is bar" local p function p.main(frame) text = frame.args[1] text = mw.ustring.gsub('%[%[.*|', '') --strip out piped link text text = mw.ustring.gsub ('%[', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] text = mw.ustring.gsub ('%]', '') return text end return p

--converts text with wikilinks, e.g "[[foo|gah]] is [[bar]]" to "gah is bar" local p = {} function p.main(frame) text = frame.args[1] text = mw.ustring.gsub('%[%[.*|', '') --strip out piped link text text = mw.ustring.gsub ('%[', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] text = mw.ustring.gsub ('%]', '') return text end return p

--converts text with wikilinks, e.g "[[foo|gah]] is [[bar]]" to "gah is bar" local p = {} function p.main(frame) text = frame.args[1] text = mw.ustring.gsub(text, '%[%[.*|', '') --strip out piped link text text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%[', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%]', '') return text end return p

--converts text with wikilinks to plain text, e.g "[[foo|gah]] is [[bar]]" to "gah is bar" local p = {} function p.main(frame) text = frame.args[1] text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%[%[.*|', '') --strip out piped link text text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%[', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%]', '') return text end return p

--converts text with wikilinks to plain text, e.g "[[foo|gah]] is [[bar]]" to "gah is bar" local p = {} function p.main(frame) text = frame.args[1] text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%[%[.-|', '') --strip out piped link text text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%[', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%]', '') return text end return p

--converts text with wikilinks to plain text, e.g "[[foo|gah]] is [[bar]]" to "gah is bar" --also strips out files local p = {} function p.main(frame) text = frame.args[1] text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%[%[File:.-%]%]', '') --strip out files text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%[%[.-|', '') --strip out piped link text text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%[', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%]', '') return text end return p

--converts text with wikilinks to plain text, e.g "[[foo|gah]] is [[bar]]" to "gah is bar" --also strips out files local p = {} function p.main(frame) text = frame.args[1] text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%[%[File:.-%]%]', '') --strip out files text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%[%[.-|', '') --strip out piped link text text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%[', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%]', '') text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%s+', ' ') --need to strip duplicate spaces, as removing file leaves an extra space after it return text end return p

--converts text with wikilinks to plain text, e.g "[[foo|gah]] is [[bar]]" to "gah is bar" --also strips out flags local p = {} function p.main(frame) text = frame.args[1] text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '.-', '') --strip out flags text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%[%[.-|', '') --strip out piped link text text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%[', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%]', '') text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%s+', ' ') --need to strip duplicate spaces, as removing file leaves an extra space after it return text end return p

--converts text with wikilinks to plain text, e.g "[[foo|gah]] is [[bar]]" to "gah is bar" --also strips out flags and images if desired local p = {} function p.main(frame) text = frame.args[1] if args.flag then text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '.-', '') end --strip out flags if args.file then text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%[%[File:.-%]%]', '') end --strip out files text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%[%[.-|', '') --strip out piped link text text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%[', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%]', '') return text end return p

revision.comment: no need for args, remove anything in
revision.text: --converts text with wikilinks to plain text, e.g "[[foo|gah]] is [[bar]]" to "gah is bar" --removes anything enclosed in tags and files local p = {} function p.main(frame) text = frame.args[1] text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '<.->.-<.->', '') --strip out flags, plus any other tags, e.g footnotes text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%[%[File:.-%]%]', '') --strip out files text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%[%[.-|', '') --strip out piped link text text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%[', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%]', '') return text end return p

revision.comment: copy from [[Module:Citation/CS1/COinS]], see its history for attribution - strip italics and bold
revision.text:
--converts text with wikilinks to plain text, e.g "[[foo|gah]] is [[bar]]" to "gah is bar" --removes anything enclosed in tags and files local p = {} --copied from Module:Citation/CS1/COinS
function p.strip_apostrophe_markup (argument) if argument:find ( "''", 1, true ) == nil then -- Is there at least one double apostrophe? If not, exit. return argument end
while true do if argument:find ( "'''''", 1, true ) then -- bold italic (5) argument=argument:gsub("%'%'%'%'%'", ""); -- remove all instances of it elseif argument:find ( "''''", 1, true ) then -- italic start and end without content (4) argument=argument:gsub("%'%'%'%'", ""); elseif argument:find ( "'''", 1, true ) then -- bold (3) argument=argument:gsub("%'%'%'", ""); elseif argument:find ( "''", 1, true ) then -- italic (2) argument=argument:gsub("%'%'", ""); else break; end end return argument; -- done end
function p.main(frame) text = frame.args[1] text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '<.->.-<.->', '') --strip out flags, plus any other tags, e.g footnotes text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%[%[File:.-%]%]', '') --strip out files text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%[%[.-|', '') --strip out piped link text text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%[', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%]', '') strip_apostrophe_markup(text) return text end
return p

--converts text with wikilinks to plain text, e.g "[[foo|gah]] is [[bar]]" to "gah is bar" --removes anything enclosed in tags and files local p = {} --copied from Module:Citation/CS1/COinS
function p.strip_apostrophe_markup (argument) if argument:find ( "''", 1, true ) == nil then -- Is there at least one double apostrophe? If not, exit. return argument end
while true do if argument:find ( "'''''", 1, true ) then -- bold italic (5) argument=argument:gsub("%'%'%'%'%'", ""); -- remove all instances of it elseif argument:find ( "''''", 1, true ) then -- italic start and end without content (4) argument=argument:gsub("%'%'%'%'", ""); elseif argument:find ( "'''", 1, true ) then -- bold (3) argument=argument:gsub("%'%'%'", ""); elseif argument:find ( "''", 1, true ) then -- italic (2) argument=argument:gsub("%'%'", ""); else break; end end return argument; -- done end
function p.main(frame) text = frame.args[1] text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '<.->.-<.->', '') --strip out flags, plus any other tags, e.g footnotes text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%[%[File:.-%]%]', '') --strip out files text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%[%[.-|', '') --strip out piped link text text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%[', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%]', '') text = strip_apostrophe_markup(text) return text end
return p

--converts text with wikilinks to plain text, e.g "[[foo|gah]] is [[bar]]" to "gah is bar" --removes anything enclosed in tags and files local p = {}
--this function is copied from Module:Citation/CS1/COinS function p.strip_apostrophe_markup (argument) if argument:find ( "''", 1, true ) == nil then -- Is there at least one double apostrophe? If not, exit. return argument end
while true do if argument:find ( "'''''", 1, true ) then -- bold italic (5) argument=argument:gsub("%'%'%'%'%'", ""); -- remove all instances of it elseif argument:find ( "''''", 1, true ) then -- italic start and end without content (4) argument=argument:gsub("%'%'%'%'", ""); elseif argument:find ( "'''", 1, true ) then -- bold (3) argument=argument:gsub("%'%'%'", ""); elseif argument:find ( "''", 1, true ) then -- italic (2) argument=argument:gsub("%'%'", ""); else break; end end return argument; -- done end
function p.main(frame) text = frame.args[1] text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '<.->.-<.->', '') --strip out flags, plus any other tags, e.g footnotes text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%[%[File:.-%]%]', '') --strip out files text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%[%[.-|', '') --strip out piped link text text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%[', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%]', '') text = strip_apostrophe_markup(text) return text end
return p

--converts text with wikilinks to plain text, e.g "[[foo|gah]] is [[bar]]" to "gah is bar" --removes anything enclosed in tags and files local p = {}
--this function is copied from Module:Citation/CS1/COinS function p.strip_apostrophe_markup (argument) if argument:find ( "''", 1, true ) == nil then -- Is there at least one double apostrophe? If not, exit. return argument end
while true do if argument:find ( "'''''", 1, true ) then -- bold italic (5) argument=argument:gsub("%'%'%'%'%'", ""); -- remove all instances of it elseif argument:find ( "''''", 1, true ) then -- italic start and end without content (4) argument=argument:gsub("%'%'%'%'", ""); elseif argument:find ( "'''", 1, true ) then -- bold (3) argument=argument:gsub("%'%'%'", ""); elseif argument:find ( "''", 1, true ) then -- italic (2) argument=argument:gsub("%'%'", ""); else break; end end return argument; -- done end
function p.main(frame) text = frame.args[1] text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '<.->.-<.->', '') --strip out flags, plus any other tags, e.g footnotes text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%[%[File:.-%]%]', '') --strip out files text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%[%[.-|', '') --strip out piped link text text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%[', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%]', '') text = p.strip_apostrophe_markup(text) return text end
return p

--converts text with wikilinks to plain text, e.g "[[foo|gah]] is [[bar]]" to "gah is bar" --removes anything enclosed in tags and files, and italic and bold markup local p = {}
--this function is copied from Module:Citation/CS1/COinS function p.strip_apostrophe_markup (argument) if argument:find ( "''", 1, true ) == nil then -- Is there at least one double apostrophe? If not, exit. return argument end
while true do if argument:find ( "'''''", 1, true ) then -- bold italic (5) argument=argument:gsub("%'%'%'%'%'", ""); -- remove all instances of it elseif argument:find ( "''''", 1, true ) then -- italic start and end without content (4) argument=argument:gsub("%'%'%'%'", ""); elseif argument:find ( "'''", 1, true ) then -- bold (3) argument=argument:gsub("%'%'%'", ""); elseif argument:find ( "''", 1, true ) then -- italic (2) argument=argument:gsub("%'%'", ""); else break; end end return argument; -- done end
function p.main(frame) text = frame.args[1] text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '<.->.-<.->', '') --strip out flags, plus any other tags, e.g footnotes text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%[%[File:.-%]%]', '') --strip out files text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%[%[.-|', '') --strip out piped link text text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%[', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] text = mw.ustring.gsub (text, '%]', '') text = p.strip_apostrophe_markup(text) return text end
return p

revision.comment: use ustring to handle unicode - makes it slightly less elegant though :(
Undid revision 836760349 by [[Special:Contributions/Pppery|Pppery]] ([[User talk:Pppery|talk]]) hold on, test something
Lua patterns are so limited, but at least one can do this
since we're optimizing this, omit unnecessary mw.ustring.gsub; will explain on talk
split so can be used in other lua modules
revision.text:
--converts text with wikilinks to plain text, e.g "[[foo|gah]] is [[bar]]" to "gah is bar" --removes anything enclosed in tags that isn't nested, mediawiki strip markers (references etc), files, italic and bold markup local p = {}
function p.main(frame) local text = frame.args[1] or '' return p_main(text) end
function p._main(text) text = mw.text.killMarkers(text) :gsub('<.->.-<.->', '') --strip out tags :gsub('%[%[%s*File%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out files :gsub('%[%[.-|', '') --strip out piped link text :gsub('[%[%]]', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] :gsub("'''''", "") --strip out bold italic markup :gsub("'''?", "") --not stripping out '''' gives correct output for bolded text in quotes return text end
return p

--converts text with wikilinks to plain text, e.g "[[foo|gah]] is [[bar]]" to "gah is bar" --removes anything enclosed in tags that isn't nested, mediawiki strip markers (references etc), files, italic and bold markup local p = {}
function p.main(frame) local text = frame.args[1] or '' return p._main(text) end
function p._main(text) text = mw.text.killMarkers(text) :gsub('<.->.-<.->', '') --strip out tags :gsub('%[%[%s*File%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out files :gsub('%[%[.-|', '') --strip out piped link text :gsub('[%[%]]', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] :gsub("'''''", "") --strip out bold italic markup :gsub("'''?", "") --not stripping out '''' gives correct output for bolded text in quotes return text end
return p

--converts text with wikilinks to plain text, e.g "[[foo|gah]] is [[bar]]" to "gah is bar" --removes anything enclosed in tags that isn't nested, mediawiki strip markers (references etc), files, italic and bold markup local p = {}
function p.main(frame) local text = frame.args[1] return p._main(text) end
function p._main(text) if not text then return end text = mw.text.killMarkers(text) :gsub('<.->.-<.->', '') --strip out tags :gsub('%[%[%s*File%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out files :gsub('%[%[.-|', '') --strip out piped link text :gsub('[%[%]]', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] :gsub("'''''", "") --strip out bold italic markup :gsub("'''?", "") --not stripping out '''' gives correct output for bolded text in quotes return text end
return p

revision.comment: Protected "[[Module:Plain text]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|High-risk Lua module]] ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
revision.text:
--converts text with wikilinks to plain text, e.g "[[foo|gah]] is [[bar]]" to "gah is bar" --removes anything enclosed in tags that isn't nested, mediawiki strip markers (references etc), files, italic and bold markup local p = {}
function p.main(frame) local text = frame.args[1] return p._main(text) end
function p._main(text) if not text then return end text = mw.text.killMarkers(text) :gsub('<.->.-<.->', '') --strip out tags :gsub('%[%[%s*File%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out files :gsub('%[%[.-|', '') --strip out piped link text :gsub('[%[%]]', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] :gsub("'''''", "") --strip out bold italic markup :gsub("'''?", "") --not stripping out '''' gives correct output for bolded text in quotes return text end
return p

--converts text with wikilinks to plain text, e.g "[[foo|gah]] is [[bar]]" to "gah is bar" --removes anything enclosed in tags that isn't nested, mediawiki strip markers (references etc), files, italic and bold markup local p = {}
function p.main(frame) local text = frame.args[1] return p._main(text) end
function p._main(text) if not text then return end text = mw.text.killMarkers(text) :gsub('<.->.-<.->', '') --strip out tags :gsub('%[%[%s*File%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out files :gsub('%[%[[^%]]-|', '') --strip out piped link text :gsub('[%[%]]', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] :gsub("'''''", "") --strip out bold italic markup :gsub("'''?", "") --not stripping out '''' gives correct output for bolded text in quotes return text end
return p

--converts text with wikilinks to plain text, e.g "[[foo|gah]] is [[bar]]" to "gah is bar" --removes anything enclosed in tags that isn't nested, mediawiki strip markers (references etc), files, italic and bold markup local p = {} function p.main(frame) local text = frame.args[1] return p._main(text) end function p._main(text) if not text then return end text = mw.text.killMarkers(text) :gsub('(.+)', '%1') --remove nowrap while keeping text inside :gsub('<.->.-<.->', '') --strip out tags :gsub('%[%[%s*File%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out files :gsub('%[%[[^%]]-|', '') --strip out piped link text :gsub('[%[%]]', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] :gsub("'''''", "") --strip out bold italic markup :gsub("'''?", "") --not stripping out '''' gives correct output for bolded text in quotes return text end return p

--converts text with wikilinks to plain text, e.g "[[foo|gah]] is [[bar]]" to "gah is bar" --removes anything enclosed in tags that isn't nested, mediawiki strip markers (references etc), files, italic and bold markup local p = {} function p.main(frame) local text = frame.args[1] return p._main(text) end function p._main(text) if not text then return end text = mw.text.killMarkers(text) :gsub('(.+)', '%1') --remove nowrap while keeping text inside :gsub('
', ', ') --replace br with commas :gsub('<.->.-<.->', '') --strip out tags :gsub('%[%[%s*File%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out files :gsub('%[%[%s*Image%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out use of image: :gsub('%[%[%sCategory%s:.-%]%]', '') --strip out categories :gsub('%[%[[^%]]-|', '') --strip out piped link text :gsub('[%[%]]', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] :gsub("'''''", "") --strip out bold italic markup :gsub("'''?", "") --not stripping out '''' gives correct output for bolded text in quotes return text end return p

--converts text with wikilinks to plain text, e.g "[[foo|gah]] is [[bar]]" to "gah is bar" --removes anything enclosed in tags that isn't nested, mediawiki strip markers (references etc), files, italic and bold markup local p = {} function p.main(frame) local text = frame.args[1] return p._main(text) end function p._main(text) if not text then return end text = mw.text.killMarkers(text) :gsub('(.+)', '%1') --remove nowrap while keeping text inside :gsub('
', ', ') --replace br with commas :gsub('<.->.-<.->', '') --strip out tags :gsub('%[%[%s*[Ff]ile%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out files :gsub('%[%[%s*[Ii]mage%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out use of image: :gsub('%[%[%s*[Cc]ategory%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out categories :gsub('%[%[[^%]]-|', '') --strip out piped link text :gsub('[%[%]]', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] :gsub("'''''", "") --strip out bold italic markup :gsub("'''?", "") --not stripping out '''' gives correct output for bolded text in quotes return text end return p

revision.comment: better stripping, strip out more stuff
revision.text:
--converts text with wikilinks to plain text, e.g "[[foo|gah]] is [[bar]]" to "gah is bar" --removes anything enclosed in tags that isn't nested, mediawiki strip markers (references etc), files, italic and bold markup local p = {} function p.main(frame) local text = frame.args[1] return p._main(text) end function p._main(text) if not text then return end text = mw.text.killMarkers(text) :gsub(' ', ' ') --replace nbsp spaces with regular spaces :gsub('
', ', ') --replace br with commas :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove spans while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove italics while keeping text inside :gsub('<.->.-<.->', '') --strip out remaining tags and the text inside :gsub('<.->', '') --remove any other tag markup :gsub('%[%[%s*[Ff]ile%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out files :gsub('%[%[%s*[Ii]mage%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out use of image: :gsub('%[%[%s*[Cc]ategory%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out categories :gsub('%[%[[^%]]-|', '') --strip out piped link text :gsub('[%[%]]', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] :gsub("'''''", "") --strip out bold italic markup :gsub("'''?", "") --not stripping out '''' gives correct output for bolded text in quotes :gsub('----', '') --remove ---- lines :gsub("^%s+", "") --strip leading :gsub("%s+$", "") --and trailing spaces :gsub("%s+", " ") --strip redundant spaces return text end return p

revision.comment: implement "encode" option, strip out external link alt text
revision.text:
--converts text with wikilinks to plain text, e.g "[[foo|gah]] is [[bar]]" to "gah is bar" --removes anything enclosed in tags that isn't nested, mediawiki strip markers (references etc), files, italic and bold markup local p = {} function p.main(frame) local text = frame.args[1] local encode = require('Module:yesno')(frame.args.encode) return p._main(text, encode) end function p._main(text, encode) if not text then return end text = mw.text.killMarkers(text) :gsub(' ', ' ') --replace nbsp spaces with regular spaces :gsub('
', ', ') --replace br with commas :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove spans while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove italics while keeping text inside :gsub('<.->.-<.->', '') --strip out remaining tags and the text inside :gsub('<.->', '') --remove any other tag markup :gsub('%[%[%s*[Ff]ile%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out files :gsub('%[%[%s*[Ii]mage%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out use of image: :gsub('%[%[%s*[Cc]ategory%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out categories :gsub('%[%[[^%]]-|', '') --strip out piped link text :gsub('([^%[])%[[^%[%]][^%]]-%s', '%1') --strip out external link text :gsub('^%[[^%[%]][^%]]-%s', '') --strip out external link text :gsub('[%[%]]', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] :gsub("'''''", "") --strip out bold italic markup :gsub("'''?", "") --not stripping out '''' gives correct output for bolded text in quotes :gsub('----', '') --remove ---- lines :gsub("^%s+", "") --strip leading :gsub("%s+$", "") --and trailing spaces :gsub("%s+", " ") --strip redundant spaces if encode then return mw.text.encode(text) else return text end end return p

revision.comment: +<b>/<em>/<strong> stripping where contained text should also be kept
revision.text:
--converts text with wikilinks to plain text, e.g "[[foo|gah]] is [[bar]]" to "gah is bar" --removes anything enclosed in tags that isn't nested, mediawiki strip markers (references etc), files, italic and bold markup local p = {} function p.main(frame) local text = frame.args[1] local encode = require('Module:yesno')(frame.args.encode) return p._main(text, encode) end function p._main(text, encode) if not text then return end text = mw.text.killMarkers(text) :gsub(' ', ' ') --replace nbsp spaces with regular spaces :gsub('
', ', ') --replace br with commas :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove spans while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove italics while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove bold while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove emphasis while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove strong while keeping text inside :gsub('<.->.-<.->', '') --strip out remaining tags and the text inside :gsub('<.->', '') --remove any other tag markup :gsub('%[%[%s*[Ff]ile%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out files :gsub('%[%[%s*[Ii]mage%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out use of image: :gsub('%[%[%s*[Cc]ategory%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out categories :gsub('%[%[[^%]]-|', '') --strip out piped link text :gsub('([^%[])%[[^%[%]][^%]]-%s', '%1') --strip out external link text :gsub('^%[[^%[%]][^%]]-%s', '') --strip out external link text :gsub('[%[%]]', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] :gsub("'''''", "") --strip out bold italic markup :gsub("'''?", "") --not stripping out '''' gives correct output for bolded text in quotes :gsub('----', '') --remove ---- lines :gsub("^%s+", "") --strip leading :gsub("%s+$", "") --and trailing spaces :gsub("%s+", " ") --strip redundant spaces if encode then return mw.text.encode(text) else return text end end return p

--converts text with wikilinks to plain text, e.g "[[foo|gah]] is [[bar]]" to "gah is bar" --removes anything enclosed in tags that isn't nested, mediawiki strip markers (references etc), files, italic and bold markup local p = {} function p.main(frame) local text = frame.args[1] local encode = require('Module:yesno')(frame.args.encode) return p._main(text, encode) end function p._main(text, encode) if not text then return end text = mw.text.killMarkers(text) :gsub(' ', ' ') --replace nbsp spaces with regular spaces :gsub('
', ', ') --replace br with commas :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove spans while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove italics while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove bold while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove emphasis while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove strong while keeping text inside :gsub('<.->.-<.->', '') --strip out remaining tags and the text inside :gsub('<.->', '') --remove any other tag markup :gsub('%[%[%s*[Ff][Ii][Ll][Ee]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out files :gsub('%[%[%s*[Ii][Mm][Aa][Gg][Ee]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out use of image: :gsub('%[%[%s*[Cc][Aa][Tt][Ee][Gg][Oo][Rr][Yy]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out categories :gsub('%[%[[^%]]-|', '') --strip out piped link text :gsub('([^%[])%[[^%[%]][^%]]-%s', '%1') --strip out external link text :gsub('^%[[^%[%]][^%]]-%s', '') --strip out external link text :gsub('[%[%]]', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] :gsub("'''''", "") --strip out bold italic markup :gsub("'''?", "") --not stripping out '''' gives correct output for bolded text in quotes :gsub('----', '') --remove ---- lines :gsub("^%s+", "") --strip leading :gsub("%s+$", "") --and trailing spaces :gsub("%s+", " ") --strip redundant spaces if encode then return mw.text.encode(text) else return text end end return p

revision.comment: horizontal rules created via ---- can have any number of dashes after the first four
revision.text:
--converts text with wikilinks to plain text, e.g "[[foo|gah]] is [[bar]]" to "gah is bar" --removes anything enclosed in tags that isn't nested, mediawiki strip markers (references etc), files, italic and bold markup local p = {} function p.main(frame) local text = frame.args[1] local encode = require('Module:yesno')(frame.args.encode) return p._main(text, encode) end function p._main(text, encode) if not text then return end text = mw.text.killMarkers(text) :gsub(' ', ' ') --replace nbsp spaces with regular spaces :gsub('
', ', ') --replace br with commas :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove spans while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove italics while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove bold while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove emphasis while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove strong while keeping text inside :gsub('<.->.-<.->', '') --strip out remaining tags and the text inside :gsub('<.->', '') --remove any other tag markup :gsub('%[%[%s*[Ff][Ii][Ll][Ee]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out files :gsub('%[%[%s*[Ii][Mm][Aa][Gg][Ee]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out use of image: :gsub('%[%[%s*[Cc][Aa][Tt][Ee][Gg][Oo][Rr][Yy]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out categories :gsub('%[%[[^%]]-|', '') --strip out piped link text :gsub('([^%[])%[[^%[%]][^%]]-%s', '%1') --strip out external link text :gsub('^%[[^%[%]][^%]]-%s', '') --strip out external link text :gsub('[%[%]]', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] :gsub("'''''", "") --strip out bold italic markup :gsub("'''?", "") --not stripping out '''' gives correct output for bolded text in quotes :gsub('----+', '') --remove ---- lines :gsub("^%s+", "") --strip leading :gsub("%s+$", "") --and trailing spaces :gsub("%s+", " ") --strip redundant spaces if encode then return mw.text.encode(text) else return text end end return p

--converts text with wikilinks to plain text, e.g "[[foo|gah]] is [[bar]]" to "gah is bar" --removes anything enclosed in tags that isn't nested, mediawiki strip markers (references etc), files, italic and bold markup require[[strict]] local p = {} function p.main(frame) local text = frame.args[1] local encode = require('Module:yesno')(frame.args.encode) return p._main(text, encode) end function p._main(text, encode) if not text then return end text = mw.text.killMarkers(text) :gsub(' ', ' ') --replace nbsp spaces with regular spaces :gsub('
', ', ') --replace br with commas :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove spans while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove italics while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove bold while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove emphasis while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove strong while keeping text inside :gsub('<.->.-<.->', '') --strip out remaining tags and the text inside :gsub('<.->', '') --remove any other tag markup :gsub('%[%[%s*[Ff][Ii][Ll][Ee]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out files :gsub('%[%[%s*[Ii][Mm][Aa][Gg][Ee]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out use of image: :gsub('%[%[%s*[Cc][Aa][Tt][Ee][Gg][Oo][Rr][Yy]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out categories :gsub('%[%[[^%]]-|', '') --strip out piped link text :gsub('([^%[])%[[^%[%]][^%]]-%s', '%1') --strip out external link text :gsub('^%[[^%[%]][^%]]-%s', '') --strip out external link text :gsub('[%[%]]', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] :gsub("'''''", "") --strip out bold italic markup :gsub("'''?", "") --not stripping out '''' gives correct output for bolded text in quotes :gsub('----+', '') --remove ---- lines :gsub("^%s+", "") --strip leading :gsub("%s+$", "") --and trailing spaces :gsub("%s+", " ") --strip redundant spaces if encode then return mw.text.encode(text) else return text end end return p

revision.comment: keep contents of sub, sup, and underline (see talk)
revision.text:
--converts text with wikilinks to plain text, e.g "[[foo|gah]] is [[bar]]" to "gah is bar" --removes anything enclosed in tags that isn't nested, mediawiki strip markers (references etc), files, italic and bold markup require[[strict]] local p = {} function p.main(frame) local text = frame.args[1] local encode = require('Module:yesno')(frame.args.encode) return p._main(text, encode) end function p._main(text, encode) if not text then return end text = mw.text.killMarkers(text) :gsub(' ', ' ') --replace nbsp spaces with regular spaces :gsub('
', ', ') --replace br with commas :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove spans while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove italics while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove bold while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove emphasis while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove strong while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove subscript markup; retain contents :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove superscript markup; retain contents :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove underline markup; retain contents :gsub('<.->.-<.->', '') --strip out remaining tags and the text inside :gsub('<.->', '') --remove any other tag markup :gsub('%[%[%s*[Ff][Ii][Ll][Ee]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out files :gsub('%[%[%s*[Ii][Mm][Aa][Gg][Ee]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out use of image: :gsub('%[%[%s*[Cc][Aa][Tt][Ee][Gg][Oo][Rr][Yy]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out categories :gsub('%[%[[^%]]-|', '') --strip out piped link text :gsub('([^%[])%[[^%[%]][^%]]-%s', '%1') --strip out external link text :gsub('^%[[^%[%]][^%]]-%s', '') --strip out external link text :gsub('[%[%]]', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] :gsub("'''''", "") --strip out bold italic markup :gsub("'''?", "") --not stripping out '''' gives correct output for bolded text in quotes :gsub('----+', '') --remove ---- lines :gsub("^%s+", "") --strip leading :gsub("%s+$", "") --and trailing spaces :gsub("%s+", " ") --strip redundant spaces if encode then return mw.text.encode(text) else return text end end return p

--converts text with wikilinks to plain text, e.g "[[foo|gah]] is [[bar]]" to "gah is bar" --removes anything enclosed in tags that isn't nested, mediawiki strip markers (references etc), files, italic and bold markup require[[strict]] local p = {} function p.main(frame) local text = frame.args[1] local encode = require('Module:yesno')(frame.args.encode) return p._main(text, encode) end function p._main(text, encode) if not text then return end text = mw.text.killMarkers(text) :gsub(' ', ' ') --replace nbsp spaces with regular spaces :gsub('
', ', ') --replace br with commas :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove spans while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove italics while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove bold while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove emphasis while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove strong while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove subscript markup; retain contents :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove superscript markup; retain contents :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove underline markup; retain contents :gsub('<.->.-<.->', '') --strip out remaining tags and the text inside :gsub('<.->', '') --remove any other tag markup :gsub('%[%[%s*[Ff][Ii][Ll][Ee]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out files :gsub('%[%[%s*[Ii][Mm][Aa][Gg][Ee]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out use of image: :gsub('%[%[%s*[Cc][Aa][Tt][Ee][Gg][Oo][Rr][Yy]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out categories :gsub('%[%[[^%]]-|', '') --strip out piped link text :gsub('([^%[])%[[^%[%]][^%]]-%s', '%1') --strip out external link text :gsub('^%[[^%[%]][^%]]-%s', '') --strip out external link text :gsub('[%[%]]', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] :gsub("'''''", "") --strip out bold italic markup :gsub("'''?", "") --not stripping out '''' gives correct output for bolded text in quotes :gsub('----+', '') --remove ---- lines :gsub("^%s+", "") --strip leading :gsub("%s+$", "") --and trailing spaces :gsub("%s+", " ") --strip redundant spaces if encode then return mw.text.encode(text) else return text end end return p

--converts text with wikilinks to plain text, e.g "[[foo|gah]] is [[bar]]" to "gah is bar" --removes anything enclosed in tags that isn't nested, mediawiki strip markers (references etc), files, italic and bold markup require[[strict]] local p = {} function p.main(frame) local text = frame.args[1] local encode = require('Module:yesno')(frame.args.encode) return p._main(text, encode) end function p._main(text, encode) if not text then return end text = mw.text.killMarkers(text) :gsub(' ', ' ') --replace nbsp spaces with regular spaces :gsub('
', ', ') --replace br with commas :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove spans while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove italics while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove bold while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove emphasis while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove strong while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove subscript markup; retain contents :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove superscript markup; retain contents :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove underline markup; retain contents :gsub('<.->.-<.->', '') --strip out remaining tags and the text inside :gsub('<.->', '') --remove any other tag markup :gsub('%[%[%s*[Ff][Ii][Ll][Ee]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out files :gsub('%[%[%s*[Ii][Mm][Aa][Gg][Ee]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out use of image: :gsub('%[%[%s*[Cc][Aa][Tt][Ee][Gg][Oo][Rr][Yy]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out categories :gsub('%[%[[^%]]-|', '') --strip out piped link text :gsub('([^%[])%[[^%[%]][^%]]-%s', '%1') --strip out external link text :gsub('^%[[^%[%]][^%]]-%s', '') --strip out external link text :gsub('[%[%]]', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] :gsub("'''''", "") --strip out bold italic markup :gsub("'''?", "") --not stripping out '''' gives correct output for bolded text in quotes :gsub('%-%-%-%-+', '') --remove ---- lines :gsub("^%s+", "") --strip leading :gsub("%s+$", "") --and trailing spaces :gsub("%s+", " ") --strip redundant spaces if encode then return mw.text.encode(text) else return text end end return p

--converts text with wikilinks to plain text, e.g "[[foo|gah]] is [[bar]]" to "gah is bar" --removes anything enclosed in tags that isn't nested, mediawiki strip markers (references etc), files, italic and bold markup require[[strict]] local p = {} function p.main(frame) local text = frame.args[1] local encode = require('Module:yesno')(frame.args.encode) return p._main(text, encode) end function p._main(text, encode) if not text then return end text = mw.text.killMarkers(text) :gsub(' ', ' ') --replace nbsp spaces with regular spaces :gsub('
', ', ') --replace br with commas :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove spans while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove italics while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove bold while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove emphasis while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove strong while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove subscript markup; retain contents :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove superscript markup; retain contents :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove underline markup; retain contents :gsub('<.->.-<.->', '') --strip out remaining tags and the text inside :gsub('<.->', '') --remove any other tag markup :gsub('%[%[%s*[Ff][Ii][Ll][Ee]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out files :gsub('%[%[%s*[Ii][Mm][Aa][Gg][Ee]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out use of image: :gsub('%[%[%s*[Cc][Aa][Tt][Ee][Gg][Oo][Rr][Yy]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out categories :gsub('%[%[[^%]]-|', '') --strip out piped link text :gsub('([^%[])%[[^%[%]][^%]]-%s', '%1') --strip out external link text :gsub('^%[[^%[%]][^%]]-%s', '') --strip out external link text :gsub('[%[%]]', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] :gsub("'''''", "") --strip out bold italic markup :gsub("'''?", "") --not stripping out '''' gives correct output for bolded text in quotes :gsub('%-%-%-%-+', '') --remove ---- lines :gsub("^%s+", "") --strip leading :gsub("%s+$", "") --and trailing spaces :gsub("%s+", " ") --strip redundant spaces if encode then return mw.text.encode(text) else return text end end return p

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
--converts text with wikilinks to plain text, e.g "[[:en:Foo|gah]] is [[bar]]" to "gah is bar" --removes anything enclosed in tags that isn't nested, mediawiki strip markers (references etc), files, italic and bold markup require[[strict]] local p = {} function p.main(frame) local text = frame.args[1] local encode = require('Module:yesno')(frame.args.encode) return p._main(text, encode) end function p._main(text, encode) if not text then return end text = mw.text.killMarkers(text) :gsub(' ', ' ') --replace nbsp spaces with regular spaces :gsub('
', ', ') --replace br with commas :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove spans while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove italics while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove bold while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove emphasis while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove strong while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove subscript markup; retain contents :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove superscript markup; retain contents :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove underline markup; retain contents :gsub('<.->.-<.->', '') --strip out remaining tags and the text inside :gsub('<.->', '') --remove any other tag markup :gsub('%[%[%s*[Ff][Ii][Ll][Ee]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out files :gsub('%[%[%s*[Ii][Mm][Aa][Gg][Ee]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out use of image: :gsub('%[%[%s*[Cc][Aa][Tt][Ee][Gg][Oo][Rr][Yy]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out categories :gsub('%[%[[^%]]-|', '') --strip out piped link text :gsub('([^%[])%[[^%[%]][^%]]-%s', '%1') --strip out external link text :gsub('^%[[^%[%]][^%]]-%s', '') --strip out external link text :gsub('[%[%]]', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] :gsub("'''''", "") --strip out bold italic markup :gsub("'''?", "") --not stripping out '''' gives correct output for bolded text in quotes :gsub('%-%-%-%-+', '') --remove ---- lines :gsub("^%s+", "") --strip leading :gsub("%s+$", "") --and trailing spaces :gsub("%s+", " ") --strip redundant spaces if encode then return mw.text.encode(text) else return text end end return p

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 41 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Module:Plain_text]]
revision.text:
--converts text with wikilinks to plain text, e.g "[[:en:Foo|gah]] is [[bar]]" to "gah is bar" --removes anything enclosed in tags that isn't nested, mediawiki strip markers (references etc), files, italic and bold markup require[[strict]] local p = {} function p.main(frame) local text = frame.args[1] local encode = require('Module:yesno')(frame.args.encode) return p._main(text, encode) end function p._main(text, encode) if not text then return end text = mw.text.killMarkers(text) :gsub(' ', ' ') --replace nbsp spaces with regular spaces :gsub('
', ', ') --replace br with commas :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove spans while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove italics while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove bold while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove emphasis while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove strong while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove subscript markup; retain contents :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove superscript markup; retain contents :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove underline markup; retain contents :gsub('<.->.-<.->', '') --strip out remaining tags and the text inside :gsub('<.->', '') --remove any other tag markup :gsub('%[%[%s*[Ff][Ii][Ll][Ee]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out files :gsub('%[%[%s*[Ii][Mm][Aa][Gg][Ee]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out use of image: :gsub('%[%[%s*[Cc][Aa][Tt][Ee][Gg][Oo][Rr][Yy]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out categories :gsub('%[%[[^%]]-|', '') --strip out piped link text :gsub('([^%[])%[[^%[%]][^%]]-%s', '%1') --strip out external link text :gsub('^%[[^%[%]][^%]]-%s', '') --strip out external link text :gsub('[%[%]]', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] :gsub("'''''", "") --strip out bold italic markup :gsub("'''?", "") --not stripping out '''' gives correct output for bolded text in quotes :gsub('%-%-%-%-+', '') --remove ---- lines :gsub("^%s+", "") --strip leading :gsub("%s+$", "") --and trailing spaces :gsub("%s+", " ") --strip redundant spaces if encode then return mw.text.encode(text) else return text end end return p

--converts text with wikilinks to plain text, e.g "[[foo|gah]] is [[bar]]" to "gah is bar" --removes anything enclosed in tags that isn't nested, mediawiki strip markers (references etc), files, italic and bold markup require[[strict]] local p = {} function p.main(frame) local text = frame.args[1] local encode = require('Module:yesno')(frame.args.encode) return p._main(text, encode) end function p._main(text, encode) if not text then return end text = mw.text.killMarkers(text) :gsub(' ', ' ') --replace nbsp spaces with regular spaces :gsub('
', ', ') --replace br with commas :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove spans while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove italics while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove bold while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove emphasis while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove strong while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove subscript markup; retain contents :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove superscript markup; retain contents :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove underline markup; retain contents :gsub('<.->.-<.->', '') --strip out remaining tags and the text inside :gsub('<.->', '') --remove any other tag markup :gsub('%[%[%s*[Ff][Ii][Ll][Ee]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out files :gsub('%[%[%s*[Ii][Mm][Aa][Gg][Ee]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out use of image: :gsub('%[%[%s*[Cc][Aa][Tt][Ee][Gg][Oo][Rr][Yy]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out categories :gsub('%[%[[^%]]-|', '') --strip out piped link text :gsub('([^%[])%[[^%[%]][^%]]-%s', '%1') --strip out external link text :gsub('^%[[^%[%]][^%]]-%s', '') --strip out external link text :gsub('[%[%]]', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] :gsub("'''''", "") --strip out bold italic markup :gsub("'''?", "") --not stripping out '''' gives correct output for bolded text in quotes :gsub('%-%-%-%-+', '') --remove ---- lines :gsub("^%s+", "") --strip leading :gsub("%s+$", "") --and trailing spaces :gsub("%s+", " ") --strip redundant spaces if encode then return mw.text.encode(text) else return text end end return p

--converts text with wikilinks to plain text, e.g "[[foo|gah]] is [[bar]]" to "gah is bar" --removes anything enclosed in tags that isn't nested, mediawiki strip markers (references etc), files, italic and bold markup require[[strict]] local p = {} function p.main(frame) local text = frame.args[1] local encode = require('Module:yesno')(frame.args.encode) return p._main(text, encode) end function p._main(text, encode) if not text then return end text = mw.text.killMarkers(text) :gsub(' ', ' ') --replace nbsp spaces with regular spaces :gsub('
', ', ') --replace br with commas :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove spans while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove italics while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove bold while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove emphasis while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove strong while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove subscript markup; retain contents :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove superscript markup; retain contents :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove underline markup; retain contents :gsub('<.->.-<.->', '') --strip out remaining tags and the text inside :gsub('<.->', '') --remove any other tag markup :gsub('%[%[%s*[Ff][Ii][Ll][Ee]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out files :gsub('%[%[%s*[Ii][Mm][Aa][Gg][Ee]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out use of image: :gsub('%[%[%s*[Cc][Aa][Tt][Ee][Gg][Oo][Rr][Yy]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out categories :gsub('%[%[[^%]]-|', '') --strip out piped link text :gsub('([^%[])%[[^%[%]][^%]]-%s', '%1') --strip out external link text :gsub('^%[[^%[%]][^%]]-%s', '') --strip out external link text :gsub('[%[%]]', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] :gsub("'''''", "") --strip out bold italic markup :gsub("'''?", "") --not stripping out '''' gives correct output for bolded text in quotes :gsub('%-%-%-%-+', '') --remove ---- lines :gsub("^%s+", "") --strip leading :gsub("%s+$", "") --and trailing spaces :gsub("%s+", " ") --strip redundant spaces if encode then return mw.text.encode(text) else return text end end return p

--converts text with wikilinks to plain text, e.g "[[foo|gah]] is [[bar]]" to "gah is bar" --removes anything enclosed in tags that isn't nested, mediawiki strip markers (references etc), files, italic and bold markup require[[strict]] local p = {} function p.main(frame) local text = frame.args[1] local encode = require('Module:yesno')(frame.args.encode) return p._main(text, encode) end function p._main(text, encode) if not text then return end text = mw.text.killMarkers(text) :gsub(' ', ' ') --replace nbsp spaces with regular spaces :gsub('
', ', ') --replace br with commas :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove spans while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove italics while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove bold while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove emphasis while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove strong while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove subscript markup; retain contents :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove superscript markup; retain contents :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove underline markup; retain contents :gsub('<.->.-<.->', '') --strip out remaining tags and the text inside :gsub('<.->', '') --remove any other tag markup :gsub('%[%[%s*[Ff][Ii][Ll][Ee]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out files :gsub('%[%[%s*[Ii][Mm][Aa][Gg][Ee]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out use of image: :gsub('%[%[%s*[Cc][Aa][Tt][Ee][Gg][Oo][Rr][Yy]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out categories :gsub('%[%[[^%]]-|', '') --strip out piped link text :gsub('([^%[])%[[^%[%]][^%]]-%s', '%1') --strip out external link text :gsub('^%[[^%[%]][^%]]-%s', '') --strip out external link text :gsub('[%[%]]', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] :gsub("'''''", "") --strip out bold italic markup :gsub("'''?", "") --not stripping out '''' gives correct output for bolded text in quotes :gsub('%-%-%-%-+', '') --remove ---- lines :gsub("^%s+", "") --strip leading :gsub("%s+$", "") --and trailing spaces :gsub("%s+", " ") --strip redundant spaces if encode then return mw.text.encode(text) else return text end end return p

', ', ') --replace br with commas :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove spans while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove italics while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove bold while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove emphasis while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove strong while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove subscript markup; retain contents :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove superscript markup; retain contents :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove underline markup; retain contents :gsub('<.->.-<.->', '') --strip out remaining tags and the text inside :gsub('<.->', '') --remove any other tag markup :gsub('%[%[%s*[Ff][Ii][Ll][Ee]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out files :gsub('%[%[%s*[Ii][Mm][Aa][Gg][Ee]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out use of image: :gsub('%[%[%s*[Cc][Aa][Tt][Ee][Gg][Oo][Rr][Yy]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out categories :gsub('%[%[[^%]]-|', '') --strip out piped link text :gsub('([^%[])%[[^%[%]][^%]]-%s', '%1') --strip out external link text :gsub('^%[[^%[%]][^%]]-%s', '') --strip out external link text :gsub('[%[%]]', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] :gsub("'''''", "") --strip out bold italic markup :gsub("'''?", "") --not stripping out '''' gives correct output for bolded text in quotes :gsub('%-%-%-%-+', '') --remove ---- lines :gsub("^%s+", "") --strip leading :gsub("%s+$", "") --and trailing spaces :gsub("%s+", " ") --strip redundant spaces if encode then return mw.text.encode(text) else return text end end return p

', ', ') --replace br with commas :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove spans while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove italics while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove bold while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove emphasis while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove strong while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove subscript markup; retain contents :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove superscript markup; retain contents :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove underline markup; retain contents :gsub('<.->.-<.->', '') --strip out remaining tags and the text inside :gsub('<.->', '') --remove any other tag markup :gsub('%[%[%s*[Ff][Ii][Ll][Ee]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out files :gsub('%[%[%s*[Ii][Mm][Aa][Gg][Ee]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out use of image: :gsub('%[%[%s*[Cc][Aa][Tt][Ee][Gg][Oo][Rr][Yy]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out categories :gsub('%[%[[^%]]-|', '') --strip out piped link text :gsub('([^%[])%[[^%[%]][^%]]-%s', '%1') --strip out external link text :gsub('^%[[^%[%]][^%]]-%s', '') --strip out external link text :gsub('[%[%]]', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] :gsub("'''''", "") --strip out bold italic markup :gsub("'''?", "") --not stripping out '''' gives correct output for bolded text in quotes :gsub('%-%-%-%-+', '') --remove ---- lines :gsub("^%s+", "") --strip leading :gsub("%s+$", "") --and trailing spaces :gsub("%s+", " ") --strip redundant spaces if encode then return mw.text.encode(text) else return text end end return p

--converts text with wikilinks to plain text, e.g "[[foo|gah]] is [[bar]]" to "gah is bar" --removes anything enclosed in tags that isn't nested, mediawiki strip markers (references etc), files, italic and bold markup require[[strict]] local p = {} function p.main(frame) local text = frame.args[1] local encode = require('Module:yesno')(frame.args.encode) return p._main(text, encode) end function p._main(text, encode) if not text then return end text = mw.text.killMarkers(text) :gsub(' ', ' ') --replace nbsp spaces with regular spaces :gsub('
', ', ') --replace br with commas :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove spans while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove italics while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove bold while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove emphasis while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove strong while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove subscript markup; retain contents :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove superscript markup; retain contents :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove underline markup; retain contents :gsub('<.->.-<.->', '') --strip out remaining tags and the text inside :gsub('<.->', '') --remove any other tag markup :gsub('%[%[%s*[Ff][Ii][Ll][Ee]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out files :gsub('%[%[%s*[Ii][Mm][Aa][Gg][Ee]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out use of image: :gsub('%[%[%s*[Cc][Aa][Tt][Ee][Gg][Oo][Rr][Yy]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out categories :gsub('%[%[[^%]]-|', '') --strip out piped link text :gsub('([^%[])%[[^%[%]][^%]]-%s', '%1') --strip out external link text :gsub('^%[[^%[%]][^%]]-%s', '') --strip out external link text :gsub('[%[%]]', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] :gsub("'''''", "") --strip out bold italic markup :gsub("'''?", "") --not stripping out '''' gives correct output for bolded text in quotes :gsub('%-%-%-%-+', '') --remove ---- lines :gsub("^%s+", "") --strip leading :gsub("%s+$", "") --and trailing spaces :gsub("%s+", " ") --strip redundant spaces if encode then return mw.text.encode(text) else return text end end return p

--converts text with wikilinks to plain text, e.g "[[foo|gah]] is [[bar]]" to "gah is bar" --removes anything enclosed in tags that isn't nested, mediawiki strip markers (references etc), files, italic and bold markup require[[strict]] local p = {} function p.main(frame) local text = frame.args[1] local encode = require('Module:yesno')(frame.args.encode) return p._main(text, encode) end function p._main(text, encode) if not text then return end text = mw.text.killMarkers(text) :gsub(' ', ' ') --replace nbsp spaces with regular spaces :gsub('
', ', ') --replace br with commas :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove spans while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove italics while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove bold while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove emphasis while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove strong while keeping text inside :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove subscript markup; retain contents :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove superscript markup; retain contents :gsub('(.-)', '%1') --remove underline markup; retain contents :gsub('<.->.-<.->', '') --strip out remaining tags and the text inside :gsub('<.->', '') --remove any other tag markup :gsub('%[%[%s*[Ff][Ii][Ll][Ee]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out files :gsub('%[%[%s*[Ii][Mm][Aa][Gg][Ee]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out use of image: :gsub('%[%[%s*[Cc][Aa][Tt][Ee][Gg][Oo][Rr][Yy]%s*:.-%]%]', '') --strip out categories :gsub('%[%[[^%]]-|', '') --strip out piped link text :gsub('([^%[])%[[^%[%]][^%]]-%s', '%1') --strip out external link text :gsub('^%[[^%[%]][^%]]-%s', '') --strip out external link text :gsub('[%[%]]', '') --then strip out remaining [ and ] :gsub("'''''", "") --strip out bold italic markup :gsub("'''?", "") --not stripping out '''' gives correct output for bolded text in quotes :gsub('%-%-%-%-+', '') --remove ---- lines :gsub("^%s+", "") --strip leading :gsub("%s+$", "") --and trailing spaces :gsub("%s+", " ") --strip redundant spaces if encode then return mw.text.encode(text) else return text end end return p
